raw_consumer_statement:
Macy 's credit card. XXXX XXXX is what is on my statement but am receiving past due reminders from XXXX. 

On XX/XX/year> I was in my banking system and noticed my checking account was extremely low. When I looked at my checking account there were four ( 4 ) withdrawals from Macy 's and one ( 1 ) pending. 

Total Withdrawals {$21000.00} : XX/XX/year> {$7200.00}, XX/XX/year> {$2700.00}, XX/XX/year> {$2700.00}, XX/XX/year> {$6000.00}. 

Pending that was cancelled when I called the bank : XX/XX/year> {$3300.00} I notified my bank and they put a stop to any Macy 's withdrawals. ( The bank provided me with Macy 's withdrawal # and XXXX  Claim # ). My bank put the funds back in my account and notified officials. I also received a phone call from Senior Protective Services.

Then I immediately notified Macy 's ( XXXX ) of the fraudulent charges and payments taken from my banking account. I also notified them my mailing address, email address and phone number were all changed in my Macy 's online. They were unable to help and said they would send a letter and I needed to call once that was received with the number on it. It would be 7-10 days. I never received a call or letter. I was told they shut down all my charge cards. Several weeks later they contacted my husband looking to approve a charge on the account. I've made close to 30 phone calls at various numbers since this happened. Sent registered letters and emails. Today I received a voicemail stating they have approved the reversal of {$1000.00} and to please call them.

This fraud seemed to have happened by the hackers accessing my online account. They were able to process payments and locked me out of accessing my information. They also added users to the account, XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX. Notices went to the address the hackers put in my online portal. Charges continued even after my notifications to Macy 's. They have completed some " Transfer between '' on my statement but it continues to have a past due balance and the funds have not been refunded to my checking account. I have never received anything in writing or email and they have informed me they do not do that.
